name: Gwa Group Limited.
analysis: GWA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.2800. Trade idea: entry A$2.3000, stop A$1.9998, target A$2.6363 (1.12:1) — then trail it.
